title: podman-inspect: don't ignore errors
body:
Return errors when executing the --format templates.  Otherwise,
Podman will just silently ignore them and not print any output
that could guide user into solving the issue.

Fixes: #2159
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body:
This one had a quite educational character. I starred at the format code (and Docker's) for quite a while to eventually find out that the errors were just silently ignored :^)
@baude @rhatdan PTAL.
